about.title: About
about.metaTitle: About | Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi
about.metaDescription: Assoc. Prof. Dr. Erkan Elçi - Obstetrics and Gynecology Specialist. 23 years of experience, 50+ scientific publications. CV and areas of expertise.
about.bio1: Dr. Elçi has specialized in a wide range of areas including Robotic Surgery, Infertility, High-Risk Pregnancies, Advanced Laparoscopic Surgery, Hysteroscopy, Gynecology-Oncology, Triplet Pregnancy, Pregnancy-Related Hypertension, Gestational Diabetes, Painful Menstruation and Cystectomy.
about.bio2: He completed his medical education at Ege University Faculty of Medicine in 2007 and specialized in Obstetrics and Gynecology at Yüzüncü Yıl University Faculty of Medicine in 2013.
about.bio3: Dr. Elçi has made significant contributions to the field of Obstetrics and Gynecology with over 50 research articles. Recognized in the academic field with studies published in prestigious journals, Dr. Elçi has received numerous awards and recognition for his expertise and dedication.
about.edu2Institution: Yüzüncü Yıl University Faculty of Medicine
about.edu3Title: Obstetrics and Gynecology Specialist - Associate Professor
about.publicationsDesc: Over 50 research articles have been published in prestigious international and national medical journals. He continues to contribute to current research in gynecology and obstetrics.
about.awardsDesc: He has received numerous national and international awards and recognition for his expertise and dedicated work. With academic and clinical achievements, he holds a respected position in his field.
about.footerDescription: Obstetrics and Gynecology Specialist. Serving in the fields of robotic surgery, gynecological oncology and high-risk pregnancies with 23 years of experience.
